title: Code Migration Exploration
description: Explore exact Python code migration work for DrissionPage 4.2. Focus on autobrowser.py private MixTab import, tab-like typing strategy, click.middle behavior boundary, wait/scroll/run_js/close usage, and main.py Edge/new_tab decisions.
findings: autobrowser.py 是首要迁移点：删除 DrissionPage._pages.mix_tab.MixTab 私有导入，改用本地 Protocol 或局部 Any 描述 tab-like 能力；保留 click.middle、wait.eles_loaded、scroll、run_js、close 调用形态，把真实行为留到 Phase 3 smoke。main.py 可评估 Edge 使用 set_browser_path(edge=True)，115/doubao 保留显式路径；new_tab 不需要引入 hidden。use_system_user.py 签名仍可用，不应执行 save 写配置。

title: Verification Exploration
description: Explore verification strategy for Phase 2. Separate static/type checks from real browser smoke. Identify commands that can run during Phase 2 and what should be deferred to Phase 3 due to browser path/login state.
findings: Phase 2 验证以无真实浏览器副作用为边界：uv lock --check、DrissionPage import/signature 复核、uv run mypy .、静态检查业务代码不再出现 DrissionPage._pages.mix_tab 或 MixTab 类型依赖。uv run main.py --mode short --num 1 需要浏览器路径、登录态和站点结构，放到 Phase 3。use_system_user.py 不执行，因为 save 会写配置。

title: Documentation And Specs Exploration
description: Explore README.md, CLAUDE.md, and workflow specs updates needed after Python migration. Include dependency wording, beta risk, private DrissionPage module rule, and non-impact to userscripts.
findings: README 仍有 DrissionPage 4.1.0.2+，CLAUDE 未记录 4.2 beta 风险和禁止私有 DrissionPage 模块规则，specs 未固化维护约束。文档更新不能宣称真实 smoke 已通过；应说明 userscript 不属于 DrissionPage 迁移面，并保留 Phase 3 node 检查作为未误伤回归。

title: Risk And Boundary Exploration
description: Explore risks and boundaries: beta API risk, local browser configuration writes, Edge path behavior, preserving existing browsing behavior, avoiding new deps, and dirty worktree considerations.
findings: 主要风险：4.2 beta API 仍可能变化；Edge path 从显式路径改 edge=True 可能改变本机解析行为；use_system_user_path().save() 写本机配置，不能无确认执行；click.middle 静态返回 tab 但真实行为依赖浏览器事件；必须保留随机延迟、滚动策略、Semaphore(3)，不新增依赖。当前 pyproject.toml 已有 Phase 1 改动，uv.lock ignored。

title: Plan Generation
description: Generate plan.json and .task/TASK-*.json for roadmap Phase 2: Python DrissionPage 4.2 call migration. Consume all exploration findings, keep task count practical, and write outputs under .workflow/scratch/20260514-plan-P2-python-drissionpage-42-migration.
findings: 生成 3 个执行任务：TASK-001 迁移 Python DrissionPage 调用；TASK-002 执行无真实浏览器副作用验证；TASK-003 同步 README、CLAUDE 和 specs。真实 main.py smoke 与 userscript Node 回归留到 Phase 3。
